allow: Bash(python -c " import json from graphify.detect import detect from pathlib import Path result = detect\(Path\('.'\)\) print\(json.dumps\(result\)\) ")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('total_files:', d.get\('total_files'\)\); print\('total_words:', d.get\('total_words'\)\); print\('files:', json.dumps\(d.get\('files',{}\), indent=2\)\)")
